summary.what_built: This module creates a new API endpoint that returns a mock current portfolio snapshot in JSON format.
summary.problem: It provides a way to access portfolio data programmatically via an API.
summary.risk: Medium risk because the API is new and may not handle errors or real data properly.
summary.validation: The code has been checked for basic functionality and runs without errors.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new API endpoint will be added to the application.
summary.uncertainty: The behavior of the endpoint with real data and under load is not guaranteed.
